about: Graduated from Stony Brook University with an MA in Computational Linguistics but pivoted to software development so I can afford to eat.
I'm a Full Stack Software Developer at the Kings County District Attorney's Office (KCDA). I build data-driven applications for people who actually make a difference in other people's lives.
research: My graduate research focused on using advanced stylometric feature extraction to embed language data into high-dimensional vectors.
These vectors were then used for authorship attribution, the task of automatically identifying the author of a document.

projects.title: Gram2Vec
projects.description: Document embedding algorithm that projects documents into a high dimensional vector space based of grammatical writing style
